_meta.description: Trading strategy comparison dashboard — all 18 A-S paper trading performance
changelog: 2026-04-13 — Full redesign: market-hours-only queries, auto-scaling axes, consolidated leaderboard table, all 16 strategies (A-Q)
2026-04-13 — Add strategy performance heatmap (bar gauge sorted by return %, gradient color thresholds)
2026-04-16 — Add SPY/QQQ buy-and-hold benchmark lines (dashed) to portfolio value, return %, and scorecard
2026-04-16 — Add Strategy R (Core Plus) — daily-rebalance TSC upgrade alpha model (magenta #FF00FF)
2026-04-16 — Fix Scorecard SQL (ORDER BY inside UNION ALL invalid); wrap sub-selects in subqueries; add COALESCE for strategies with no state rows yet
2026-04-16 — Add Strategy S (Core Plus v2 — R + 5 new signals: VIX term, VIX9D, VRP, MOVE, HY OAS) — cyan #00FFFF
2026-04-24 — Prune F (tight SIG_C) and P (best-of combo). Remove 'Return % vs Baseline' timeseries.
2026-04-25 — Add Strategy U (Swing Trader, PDT-compliant) — bright pink #FF1493
2026-04-30 — Add Strategy V (Regime Lookup) — non-parametric LUT/kNN regime-conditional allocator. lime green #32CD32
2026-04-25 — Archive H + Q (tables preserved). Add U Swing Trader (deployed). Move to archive-not-delete policy.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, total_value AS "A (3×20%)" FROM portfolio_state WHERE CAST(strftime('%H', ts) AS INTEGER) * 60 + CAST(strftime('%M', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 570 AND 960 ORDER BY ts

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date || ' 20:00:00') AS INTEGER) AS time, ROUND(10000.0 * close / (SELECT close FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker = 'SPY' AND date >= '2026-04-13' ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 1), 2) AS "SPY Buy & Hold" FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker = 'SPY' AND date >= '2026-04-13' ORDER BY date
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date || ' 20:00:00') AS INTEGER) AS time, ROUND(10000.0 * close / (SELECT close FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker = 'SPY' AND date >= '2026-04-13' ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 1), 2) AS "SPY Buy & Hold" FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker = 'SPY' AND date >= '2026-04-13' ORDER BY date

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'A (3×20%)' AS Strategy, total_value AS Value, total_pnl AS "P&L", ROUND(((total_value - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", total_trades AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, loss_count AS Losses, CASE WHEN (win_count + loss_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'B (6×10%)' AS Strategy, total_value AS Value, total_pnl AS "P&L", ROUND(((total_value - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", total_trades AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, loss_count AS Losses, CASE WHEN (win_count + loss_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state_b ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'C (no SIG_A)' AS Strategy, total_value AS Value, total_pnl AS "P&L", ROUND(((total_value - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", total_trades AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, loss_count AS Losses, CASE WHEN (win_count + loss_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state_c ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'E (trailing)' AS Strategy, total_value AS Value, total_pnl AS "P&L", ROUND(((total_value - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", total_trades AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, loss_count AS Losses, CASE WHEN (win_count + loss_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state_e ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'F (tight SIG_C)' AS Strategy, total_value AS Value, total_pnl AS "P&L", ROUND(((total_value - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", total_trades AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, loss_count AS Losses, CASE WHEN (win_count + loss_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state_f ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'G (no time blk)' AS Strategy, total_value AS Value, total_pnl AS "P&L", ROUND(((total_value - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", total_trades AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, loss_count AS Losses, CASE WHEN (win_count + loss_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state_g ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'H (aggr trail)' AS Strategy, total_value AS Value, total_pnl AS "P&L", ROUND(((total_value - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", total_trades AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, loss_count AS Losses, CASE WHEN (win_count + loss_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state_h ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'I (leveraged)' AS Strategy, total_value AS Value, total_pnl AS "P&L", ROUND(((total_value - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", total_trades AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, loss_count AS Losses, CASE WHEN (win_count + loss_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state_i ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'J (SIG_D only)' AS Strategy, total_value AS Value, total_pnl AS "P&L", ROUND(((total_value - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", total_trades AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, loss_count AS Losses, CASE WHEN (win_count + loss_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state_j ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'K (6×10% trail)' AS Strategy, total_value AS Value, total_pnl AS "P&L", ROUND(((total_value - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", total_trades AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, loss_count AS Losses, CASE WHEN (win_count + loss_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state_k ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'L (velocity)' AS Strategy, total_value AS Value, total_pnl AS "P&L", ROUND(((total_value - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", total_trades AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, loss_count AS Losses, CASE WHEN (win_count + loss_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state_l ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'M (inv SPY)' AS Strategy, total_value AS Value, total_pnl AS "P&L", ROUND(((total_value - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", total_trades AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, loss_count AS Losses, CASE WHEN (win_count + loss_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state_m ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'N (ticker win)' AS Strategy, total_value AS Value, total_pnl AS "P&L", ROUND(((total_value - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", total_trades AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, loss_count AS Losses, CASE WHEN (win_count + loss_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state_n ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'O (regime)' AS Strategy, total_value AS Value, total_pnl AS "P&L", ROUND(((total_value - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", total_trades AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, loss_count AS Losses, CASE WHEN (win_count + loss_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state_o ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'P (best-of)' AS Strategy, total_value AS Value, total_pnl AS "P&L", ROUND(((total_value - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", total_trades AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, loss_count AS Losses, CASE WHEN (win_count + loss_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state_q ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'R (Core Plus)' AS Strategy, total_value AS Value, total_pnl AS "P&L", ROUND(((total_value - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", total_trades AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, loss_count AS Losses, CASE WHEN (win_count + loss_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state_u ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'V (Regime Lookup)' AS Strategy, total_value AS Value, total_pnl AS "P&L", ROUND(((total_value - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", total_trades AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, loss_count AS Losses, CASE WHEN (win_count + loss_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state_v ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT * FROM (SELECT 'A (3×20%)' AS Strategy, COALESCE(total_value, 10000) AS Value, COALESCE(total_pnl, 0) AS "P&L", ROUND(((COALESCE(total_value, 10000) - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", COALESCE(total_trades, 0) AS Trades, COALESCE(win_count, 0) AS Wins, COALESCE(loss_count, 0) AS Losses, CASE WHEN (COALESCE(win_count, 0) + COALESCE(loss_count, 0)) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM (SELECT 'B (6×10%)' AS Strategy, COALESCE(total_value, 10000) AS Value, COALESCE(total_pnl, 0) AS "P&L", ROUND(((COALESCE(total_value, 10000) - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", COALESCE(total_trades, 0) AS Trades, COALESCE(win_count, 0) AS Wins, COALESCE(loss_count, 0) AS Losses, CASE WHEN (COALESCE(win_count, 0) + COALESCE(loss_count, 0)) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state_b ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM (SELECT 'C (no SIG_A)' AS Strategy, COALESCE(total_value, 10000) AS Value, COALESCE(total_pnl, 0) AS "P&L", ROUND(((COALESCE(total_value, 10000) - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", COALESCE(total_trades, 0) AS Trades, COALESCE(win_count, 0) AS Wins, COALESCE(loss_count, 0) AS Losses, CASE WHEN (COALESCE(win_count, 0) + COALESCE(loss_count, 0)) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100, 1) END AS "Win %" FROM portfolio_state_v ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) UNION ALL SELECT 'SPY (buy&hold)' AS Strategy, ROUND(10000.0 * (SELECT close FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker='SPY' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) / (SELECT close FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker='SPY' AND date >= '2026-04-13' ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 1), 2) AS Value, ROUND(10000.0 * (SELECT close FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker='SPY' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) / (SELECT close FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker='SPY' AND date >= '2026-04-13' ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 1) - 10000, 2) AS "P&L", ROUND(((SELECT close FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker='SPY' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) / (SELECT close FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker='SPY' AND date >= '2026-04-13' ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 1) - 1.0) * 100, 2) AS "Return %", 0 AS Trades, 0 AS Wins, 0 AS Losses, 0.0 AS "Win %" UNION ALL SELECT 'QQQ (buy&hold)' AS Strategy, ROUND(10000.0 * (SELECT close FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker='QQQ' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) / (SELECT close FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker='QQQ' AND date >= '2026-04-13' ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 1), 2) AS Value, ROUND(10000.0 * (SELECT close FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker='QQQ' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) / (SELECT close FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker='QQQ' AND date >= '2026-04-13' ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 1) - targets.rawSql: SELECT signal_name AS Signal, trade_count AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, ROUND(avg_pnl_pct, 2) AS "Avg P&L %", ROUND(best_pnl_pct, 2) AS "Best %", ROUND(worst_pnl_pct, 2) AS "Worst %", ROUND(avg_hold_seconds/60, 0) AS "Avg Hold (min)" FROM signal_stats ORDER BY trade_count DESC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT signal_name AS Signal, trade_count AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, ROUND(avg_pnl_pct, 2) AS "Avg P&L %", ROUND(best_pnl_pct, 2) AS "Best %", ROUND(worst_pnl_pct, 2) AS "Worst %", ROUND(avg_hold_seconds/60, 0) AS "Avg Hold (min)" FROM signal_stats ORDER BY trade_count DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT signal_name AS Signal, trade_count AS Trades, win_count AS Wins, ROUND(avg_pnl_pct, 2) AS "Avg P&L %", ROUND(best_pnl_pct, 2) AS "Best %", ROUND(worst_pnl_pct, 2) AS "Worst %", ROUND(avg_hold_seconds/60, 0) AS "Avg Hold (min)" FROM signal_stats ORDER BY trade_count DESC

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS Time, ticker AS Ticker, signal AS Signal, block_reason AS Reason, ROUND(price, 2) AS Price, ROUND(change_pct, 2) AS "Change %", ROUND(sentiment_1h, 3) AS "Sent 1h", ROUND(velocity_1h, 1) AS "Vel 1h" FROM shadow_blocked ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 30
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ts AS Time, ticker AS Ticker, signal AS Signal, block_reason AS Reason, ROUND(price, 2) AS Price, ROUND(change_pct, 2) AS "Change %", ROUND(sentiment_1h, 3) AS "Sent 1h", ROUND(velocity_1h, 1) AS "Vel 1h" FROM shadow_blocked ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 30
targets.queryText: SELECT ts AS Time, ticker AS Ticker, signal AS Signal, block_reason AS Reason, ROUND(price, 2) AS Price, ROUND(change_pct, 2) AS "Change %", ROUND(sentiment_1h, 3) AS "Sent 1h", ROUND(velocity_1h, 1) AS "Vel 1h" FROM shadow_blocked ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 30

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(((COALESCE((SELECT total_value FROM portfolio_state_s ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1), 10000) - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 3) AS value
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(((COALESCE((SELECT total_value FROM portfolio_state_s ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1), 10000) - 10000) / 10000.0) * 100, 3) AS value
